{{Quote|I will not tell you that Lujayne or Carter or Pirgi or the others would want you to keep fighting, or that your fighting will make their sacrifice worth it.|Wedge Antilles, speaking at a memorial shortly after Carter's death|<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />}}
'''Carter''' was an individual who served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as a sentry<ref name="Rogue Squadron" /> in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]<ref name="TERC" /> at [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] [[Talasea base|base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talasea]]. During an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[raid on Talasea]] designed to eliminate Rogue Squadron, an elite New Republic [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], Carter was [[Death/Legends|killed]] along with five other sentries, which included [[Pirgi]], as well as Rogue Squadron [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Lujayne Forge]]. Shortly after, a memorial was held on the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Reprieve]]''. At the memorial, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] of Rogue Squadron spoke in commemoration of those who were killed during the raid. Shortly after the speech, the bodies of Carter, along with the other five sentries and Forge, were placed into caskets and sent drifting towards Talasea's [[Star/Legends|sun]], [[Morobe]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />

==Behind the scenes==
Carter was first mentioned in the [[1996]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'', written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]] as the first entry in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] series.<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />
